name: Mini Ham Strudels
recipeIngredient: 2 cups frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and cook for 4-5 minutes until they are softened.
2. Squeeze any excess moisture from the spinach. Stir in the bean sprouts, spinach, water chestnuts, and ginger with the onions. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
3. In a small bowl, combine the soy sauce and cornstarch until well mixed.
4. Add this mixture to the skillet with the onions and ingredients. Stir until thickened and remove from heat.
5. Cut each sheet of filo dough into six 5-1/2 inch squares. Arrange them into stacks of two squares each, creating 15 stacks in total.
6. Place 2 tablespoons of filling onto one corner of each stack. Fold the layers over to meet at the center, then fold in the sides over the filling and roll to the remaining corner.
7. Place the rolls seam-side down on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Brush with melted butter.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
9. In another small bowl, whisk together the dry mustard and water until well mixed. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving. Serve hot with the mustard on the side.
